top_signals.title: Gilt relief rally sends yields to biggest weekly drop since 2023
top_signals.summary: Burnham pledge to stick to fiscal rules and pullback from bets on higher BoE interest rates drive rebound
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: All-female Senate delegation sets off for High North amid growing military tensions
top_signals.summary: The itinerary is set to include briefings at Pituffik Space Base in Greenland on Arctic defense and strategic competition in the region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
